arts.ttl: Wales and Fulham star Wilson faces 10-week lay-off
arts.sum: Fulham and Wales winger Harry Wilson is set for a lengthy lay-off as he requires surgery on a fractured foot.

arts.ttl: 'Big talent': Tottenham have a young player coming through who's very similar to Adama Traore - journalist
arts.sum: Tottenham haven’t been all that active in the January transfer window so far, but there has been a couple of new arrivals this month already....

arts.ttl: Miguel Almiron Newcastle United goodbye meant there wasn't a dry eye in the house
arts.sum: Miguel Almiron leaves Newcastle United agonisingly short of the five appearances that would have propelled him into the club's top 10 all-time appearance chart in the Premier League. Almiron leaves a Newcastle side that have 12 wins already in the Premier League with 23 games gone.

arts.ttl: Fulham chase new signings after Wilson injury blow
arts.sum: Fulham’s Harry Wilson faces 10 weeks on the sidelines. The winger had to be taken off during the recent defeat at home to Manchester United. And a scan has shown a stress fracture of his foot, which will keep the Wales international out until April. Fulham, who are also without right-back Kenny Tete, will therefore […] The post Fulham chase new signings after Wilson injury blow appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United release statement as Miguel Almiron exit confirmed
arts.sum: A club statement read: "Miguel Almirón has completed a permanent transfer to Atlanta United for an undisclosed fee, subject to registration, six years after joining the Magpies from the Major League Soccer side. ‘Miggy’ arrived at St. James’ Park for a then-club-record fee in January 2019 and has gone on to make 223 appearances for Newcastle United .
